defs: The act or process of assimilating or bringing to a resemblance, likeness, or identity; also, the state of being so assimilated; as, the assimilation of one sound to another.
quotes: To aspire to an assimilation with God.
The assimilation of gases and vapors.

defs: The conversion of nutriment into the fluid or solid substance of the body, by the processes of digestion and absorption, whether in plants or animals.
quotes: Not conversing the body, not repairing it by assimilation, but preserving it by ventilation.
notes: ☞ The term assimilation has been limited by some to the final process by which the nutritive matter of the blood is converted into the substance of the tissues and organs.
